message.content:
@startuml

participant "Node" as Node
participant "RF" as RF
participant "Link" as Link
participant "Hub" as Hub
participant "testdomain.com" as TD

Node -> Link : BROADCAST: 256LW,R,F,KI7EST-0

note over RF : Repeated every 5 minutes while link is idle

...

Node -> RF : CONTROL: Request Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
RF -> Link : CONTROL: Request Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
Link -> RF : CONTROL: Grant Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1
RF -> Node : CONTROL: Grant Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1

note over RF : First frame has Start Flag set

Node -> RF : DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,_E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
RF -> Link : DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,_E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
Link -> RF : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, _R, 0C, <FEC>
RF -> Node : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, _R, 0C, <FEC>

note left of Link
Repeat until all data frames are sent.
Note that last frame has end flag set

If Link as response for command/packet then
 Response Flag will be set and second data transfer happens in reverse.
end note

Node -> RF : DATA: 0x0020 256B,4F,_S,E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
RF -> Link : DATA: 0x0020 256B,4F,_S,E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>

Link -> Hub : Final packet, assembled sequence
Hub <- Link : <sig> 0001 REST KI7EST@rfnethub.net\nPOST testdomain.com/ping
Hub -> TD : /user/KI7EST/keys
Hub <- TD : "MTIzNDU2NzgxMjM0NTY3ODEyMzQ1Njc4MTIzNDU2Nzg="
Hub -> Hub : Verify signature
Hub -> TD : /ping
Hub <- TD : 200

Link <- Hub : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, R, 0C, <FEC>
RF <- Link
Node <- RF : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, R, 0C, <FEC>

RF <- Link : DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,E <FEC>\nKI7EST@rfnethub.net 0001 REST\n200
Node <- RF : DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,E <FEC>\nKI7EST@rfnethub.net 0001 REST\n200

Node -> RF : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000,_N,_R,0C <FEC>
RF -> Link : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000,_N,_R,0C <FEC>

Node -> RF : CONTROL: Close Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
RF -> Link : CONTROL: Close Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
Link -> RF : CONTROL: Closed Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1
RF -> Node : CONTROL: Closed Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1

@enduml
